name: startgroup
short_description: Start a set of commands that can be undone/redone as a group
full_help:
startgroup

Description: 
Start a set of commands that can be undone/redone as a group

Syntax: 
startgroup  [-try] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
int

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-try]      Don't start a group if one has already been started
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
GUIControl

arguments.description: Don't start a group if one has already been started
Suspend message limits during command execution
